headline: Citigroup Declares Common Stock Dividend
summary: NEW YORK, July 21, 2026--The Board of Directors of Citigroup Inc. today declared a quarterly dividend on Citigroup’s common stock of $0.67 per share, payable on August 28, 2026, to stockholders of record on August 3, 2026.

raw.headline: Citigroup Declares Common Stock Dividend
raw.summary: NEW YORK, July 21, 2026--The Board of Directors of Citigroup Inc. today declared a quarterly dividend on Citigroup’s common stock of $0.67 per share, payable on August 28, 2026, to stockholders of record on August 3, 2026.

headline: Experian (LSE:EXPN) Stock Gets Fair Value Trim After Analyst Target Reset
summary: Experian is back in focus as analysts reset price targets to £3,500, down from earlier levels such as £4,550 and £4,000. Research commentary frames this change as a recalibration of what is seen as a fair reflection of Experian’s execution and growth profile, rather than a wholesale shift in stance. Reading on, you will see how these evolving targets fit into the wider analyst narrative and what to watch as expectations continue to adjust. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full...

headline: Citi’s Chew says U.S. stock positioning unwind may not be over
summary: Investing.com -- Citi told investors in a note that the recent technology-led selloff has triggered a broad deterioration in equity positioning across major markets, with the firm warning that "the unwind may not be over" in U.S. stocks.
